PowerShell($pwd_native = \(Get-Location\).Path; docker run --rm -v "${pwd_native}:/build" -w /build golang:1.26-alpine sh -c "apk add --no-cache gcc musl-dev >/dev/null 2>&1; CGO_ENABLED=1 go vet ./... 2>&1" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 80)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8080/login -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "LOGIN status=$\($r.StatusCode\) len=$\($r.Content.Length\) brandok=$\($r.Content.Contains\('-conomato'\)\)" } catch { "LOGIN ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell($session = [Microsoft.PowerShell.Commands.WebRequestSession]::new\(\); $login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8080/login -UseBasicParsing -Method POST -Body @{username="mock.magazzino"; password="x"} -WebSession $session -TimeoutSec 5 -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "POST /login status=$\($login.StatusCode\) HX-Redirect=$\($login.Headers['HX-Redirect']\)"; $pages = @\('/dashboard/magazzino','/prodotti','/categorie','/lotti/new','/prodotti/new','/impostazioni'\); foreach \($p in $pages\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080$p" -UseBasicParsing -WebSession $session -TimeoutSec 5 -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop; "$p status=$\($r.StatusCode\) len=$\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "$p ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($login = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8080/login -UseBasicParsing -Method POST -Body @{username="mock.magazzino"; password="x"} -SessionVariable sess -TimeoutSec 5 -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "POST /login status=$\($login.StatusCode\) HX-Redirect=$\($login.Headers['HX-Redirect']\) cookieCount=$\($sess.Cookies.Count\)"; $pages = @\('/dashboard/magazzino','/prodotti','/categorie','/lotti/new','/prodotti/new','/impostazioni'\); foreach \($p in $pages\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080$p" -UseBasicParsing -WebSession $sess -TimeoutSec 5 -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop; "$p status=$\($r.StatusCode\) len=$\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "$p ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; names=[l.strip\(\) for l in sys.stdin if l.strip\(\)]; print\(json.dumps\(names, separators=\(',',':'\)\)\)")

PowerShell($body = @{username='mock.magazzino';password='x'} ; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/login' -Method POST -Body $body -UseBasicParsing -SessionVariable s -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "LOGIN_STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "LOC: $\($r.Headers.Location\)"; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/storico-ordini" -UseBasicParsing -WebSession $s; "STORICO_STATUS: $\($r2.StatusCode\)"; "STORICO_LEN: $\($r2.Content.Length\)"; if \($r2.Content -match 'Storico ordini'\) { 'STORICO_TITLE_OK' } else { 'STORICO_TITLE_MISSING' })

PowerShell($body = @{username='mock.magazzino';password='x'} ; $null = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/login' -Method POST -Body $body -UseBasicParsing -SessionVariable s -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/storico-ordini?stato=ritirato" -UseBasicParsing -WebSession $s -Headers @{'HX-Request'='true'}; "PARTIAL_STATUS: $\($r2.StatusCode\)"; "PARTIAL_LEN: $\($r2.Content.Length\)"; if \($r2.Content -match 'storico-list|ec-empty|ec-stack'\) { 'PARTIAL_SHAPE_OK' } else { 'PARTIAL_SHAPE_UNKNOWN' }; $r3 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/storico-ordini?prodotto=1" -UseBasicParsing -WebSession $s; "PRODFILTER_STATUS: $\($r3.StatusCode\)")

PowerShell($body = @{username='mock.utente';password='x'} ; $null = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/login' -Method POST -Body $body -UseBasicParsing -SessionVariable s -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/dashboard" -UseBasicParsing -WebSession $s; "DASH_LEN: $\($r.Content.Length\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'id="cart-badge"'\) { 'CART_BADGE_PRESENT' } else { 'CART_BADGE_MISSING' }; if \($r.Content -match 'name="add" value="1"'\) { 'ADD_FLAG_PRESENT' } else { 'ADD_FLAG_MISSING' }; if \($r.Content -match 'fa-clock-rotate-left|Storico ordini'\) { 'STORICO_HINT_PRESENT' } else { 'STORICO_HINT_NOT_RELEVANT' })

PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "${PWD}/data:/data" alpine:3 sh -c "apk add --no-cache sqlite > /dev/null && echo '== schema spese_economali ==' && sqlite3 /data/magazzino.db '.schema spese_economali' && echo '== indici nuovi ==' && sqlite3 /data/magazzino.db `"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='index' AND tbl_name IN \('capitoli_spesa','reintegri','spese_economali','movimenti_cassa','allegati_spesa','reintegro_spese'\) ORDER BY tbl_name, name;`"")

PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "${PWD}/data:/data" alpine:3 sh -c 'apk add --no-cache sqlite > /dev/null && sqlite3 /data/magazzino.db "SELECT tbl_name, name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=''index'' AND tbl_name IN \(''capitoli_spesa'',''reintegri'',''spese_economali'',''movimenti_cassa'',''allegati_spesa'',''reintegro_spese''\) ORDER BY tbl_name, name;"')

PowerShell(docker run --rm -v "${PWD}/data:/data" alpine:3 sh -c 'apk add --no-cache sqlite > /dev/null && sqlite3 /data/magazzino.db ".indices spese_economali" && echo "---" && sqlite3 /data/magazzino.db ".indices movimenti_cassa" && echo "---" && sqlite3 /data/magazzino.db ".indices capitoli_spesa" && echo "---" && sqlite3 /data/magazzino.db ".indices reintegri"')
